Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.
